SEARCH

Package neqsim.process.safety.vibration

package neqsim.process.safety.vibration
Energy Institute AVIFF flow-induced vibration (FIV) likelihood-of-failure screening for process piping.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.safety
     
  • Class
    Description
    AcousticInducedVibrationResult
    Result of an acoustic-induced vibration (AIV) screening for a single piping circuit downstream of a pressure-reducing device.
    AcousticInducedVibrationScreening
    Acoustic-induced vibration (AIV) screening calculator for piping downstream of pressure-reducing devices (relief valves, control valves, restriction orifices, blowdown valves).
    FivLikelihoodResult
    Result of an Energy Institute AVIFF flow-induced vibration screening for a single piping circuit.
    PipingFivLikelihood
    Energy Institute AVIFF flow-induced vibration Likelihood Of Failure (LOF) bands.
    PipingFivScreening
    Energy Institute AVIFF flow-induced vibration screening calculator.
